title: cynoglossum hanangense
intro: Cynoglossum hanangense is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is commonly known as Hanang tonguewort or Hanang gromwell. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cynoglossum hanangense include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
